_comment: 允许在 en_US 渲染结果中保留中文的完整原文清单（功能性内容：SQL 列别名/valueKey 引用、匹配中文 item 描述的正则）。新增豁免须经 review。
strings: * | select arbitrary(__time__)  time_t, date_format(from_unixtime(__time__ - __time__ % 60), '%m-%d %H:%i') as time,  round(avg("duration" / 1000.0) * 1000, 3) as "平均延迟", round(approx_percentile("duration" / 1000.0, 0.95) * 1000, 3) as "P95延迟",  round(approx_percentile("duration" / 1000.0, 0.99) * 1000, 3) as "P99延迟", round(approx_percentile("duration" / 1000.0, 0.9999) * 1000, 3) as "P9999延迟"   group by time  order by time_t  limit 14400

* | select arbitrary(__time__)  time_t, date_format(from_unixtime(__time__ - __time__ % 60), '%m-%d %H:%i') as time, round(sum(case when "response_code" >= 400 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 3) as "失败率%", round(sum(case when "response_code" = 404 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 3) as "404比例%", round(sum(case when "response_code" >= 500 then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 3) as "5XX比例%"    group by time  order by time_t  limit 14400
